name: Zaitun Islami
signature: A mihrab-arch silhouette frames the cover and clips every couple photo; an islimi (8-point star) lattice border draws itself in around the cover; a gold shimmer sweeps across the couple's names once on open; a hilal (crescent) with twinkling stars marks the countdown; and a symmetric unwan medallion (manuscript-headpiece style) replaces the plain divider line between every section. The Qur'anic verse is shown in its original Arabic script alongside the Indonesian translation, rather than translation only.
brief: Elegant Islamic wedding invite — olive and gold, geometric arabesque framing, opens with a Qur'anic verse as the centerpiece rather than an afterthought. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
